title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation designed to teach students foundational AI and machine learning concepts. The program provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and teacher training to support educators in delivering responsible AI education across 165+ countries.
